title: Experiment config (run.py)
description: Single-experiment config consumed by run.py. One model, one prompt, one corpus subset, one or more seeds.

experiment_id.description: Becomes the output folder name under out/. Use YYYY-MM-DD_slug convention.

slug.description: OpenRouter model slug, e.g. qwen/qwen3.5-9b or google/gemma-2-27b-it.

params.description: Open-ended kwargs. Known OpenAI-standard keys (temperature, top_p, presence_penalty, frequency_penalty, max_tokens, n, stop, logprobs, top_logprobs) go to chat.completions.create(); everything else (e.g. top_k) is forwarded via extra_body.

thinking_mode.description: Optional. When present, translates to chat_template_kwargs.enable_thinking. Omit for models without a thinking toggle.

reasoning.description: Optional. When present, forwarded as-is to OpenRouter's reasoning.* block AND include_reasoning is set to true (so the trace returns in the response). Overrides the default exclude=true production behaviour. Used by Phase 4 CoT subsample (V4 Pro thinking-on).

subset.description: Explicit DOI list (underscore-encoded, matches set_extractions_vlm filenames).

prompt.description: Path to a prompt .md file. Content before '## System prompt' is stripped.
